mapper.sql: USER_ID, USERNAME, REAL_NAME, PWD, ORG_ID, DEPARTMENT_ID,LOCKED, ERROR_TIME, AGE, BIRTHDAY, PHONE, MOBILE, EMAIL, ADDRESS, REMARK, USER_PIC_SUFFIX, LAST_LOGIN_DATE, LAST_LOGIN_IP, DELETED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE, USER_PIC_DATA, ABOUT
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_CODE, o.ORG_NAME, o.INHERITED_NAME FROM SYS_USER u, SYS_ORG o WHERE u.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID AND u.USERNAME= #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND u.DELETED = 0

SELECT u.USER_ID, u.USERNAME, u.REAL_NAME, u.ORG_ID, o.ORG_NAME, o.INHERITED_NAME, u.LOCKED, u.PHONE, u.MOBILE, u.EMAIL, u.ADDRESS, u.REMARK, u.LAST_LOGIN_DATE, u.LAST_LOGIN_IP, u.CREATED_DATE,u.LAST_UPDATED_BY, u.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, GET_REAL_NAME(u.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY_NAME, GET_REAL_NAME(u.LAST_UPDATED_BY) AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_NAME FROM SYS_USER u, SYS_ORG o WHERE u.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID AND u.USER_ID > 0 AND u.DELETED = 0
AND (INSTR(u.USERNAME,#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) > 0 or INSTR(u.REAL_NAME,#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) > 0)
AND u.ORG_ID IN ( SELECT ORG_ID FROM sys_org WHERE FIND_IN_SET(org_id, Get_OrgChild_List(#{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC})) )
AND u.ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
ORDER BY u.LAST_UPDATED_DATE DESC, u.USER_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_USER (USER_ID, USERNAME, REAL_NAME, PWD, ORG_ID, ERROR_TIME, PHONE, MOBILE, EMAIL, ADDRESS, REMARK, LAST_LOGIN_DATE, LAST_LOGIN_IP, LOCKED, DELETED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE,age) VALUES (#{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{errorTime,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastLoginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{locked,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deleted,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{age,jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.update:
update sys_user
USERNAME = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REAL_NAME = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PWD = #{pwd,jdbcType=CHAR},
ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DEPARTMENT_ID = #{departmentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LOCKED = #{locked,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ERROR_TIME = #{errorTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
AGE = #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
PHONE = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MOBILE = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EMAIL = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_PIC_SUFFIX = #{userPicSuffix,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_LOGIN_DATE = #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_LOGIN_IP = #{lastLoginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DELETED = #{deleted,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CREATED_DATE = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USER_PIC_DATA = #{userPicData,jdbcType=LONGVARBINARY},
ABOUT = #{about,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_ID, u.REAL_NAME, u.PWD, o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_CODE, o.ORG_NAME, o.INHERITED_NAME, u.LOCKED, u.ERROR_TIME FROM SYS_USER u, SYS_ORG o WHERE u.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID AND u.USERNAME= #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND u.DELETED = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_USER SET LOCKED = #{locked,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ERROR_TIME=0, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT u.`USER_ID`,u.`USERNAME`,u.`REAL_NAME`,GET_ORG_NAME(u.org_id) as ORG_NAME FROM sys_role_user r, sys_user u WHERE u.`USER_ID` = r.`USER_ID` AND r.`ROLE_ID` = #{roleId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND u.`USER_ID` > -1 AND u.`DELETED` = 0 AND u.ORG_ID IN (SELECT ORG_ID FROM sys_org WHERE FIND_IN_SET(org_id, Get_OrgChild_List(#{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC})) )

SELECT USER_ID, HISTORY_PWD, CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM USER_PWD_HISTORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{recentTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_USER SET user_pic_data = #{userPicData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM SYS_USER u WHERE u.`USER_ID`= #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_USER SET ERROR_TIME = #{errorTime,jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM sys_role_user h,sys_role r where h.`ROLE_ID`=r.`ROLE_ID` and h.`USER_ID` =#{USER_ID}

SELECT u.USER_ID,u.USERNAME,u.REAL_NAME,GET_ORG_NAME(u.ORG_ID) AS ORG_NAME FROM SYS_ROLE_USER r, SYS_USER u WHERE u.USER_ID = r.USER_ID AND r.ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND u.USER_ID > 0 AND u.DELETED = 0
